channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: July 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: July 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date updated to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
